response: The levels of 25-hydroxy vitamin D (25OH-VD) and fatty acids (FF) were measured using enzyme-linked immunosorbent assay (ELISA) kits according to the manufacturer's instructions and were read using a 96-well microplate ELISA reader. - The level of 25OH-VD in serum was determined using an ELISA kit (catalog number: XXXX) by quantitative sandwich enzyme immunoassay technique. - The level of tumor necrosis factor-alpha (TNF-α) in serum was measured using an ELISA kit (catalog number: XXXX) by quantitative sandwich enzyme immunoassay technique. - The level of TAC in serum was measured using an ELISA kit (catalog number: XXXX) by quantitative sandwich enzyme immunoassay technique.
